meta_title: For Founders: Antigravity project template to Solve no project ideas (Beginner Comparison)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome no project ideas. A Beginner-level Comparison using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Antigravity Template to Solve Project Ideation
content.seo_description: Overcome the blank-page syndrome. Learn to use the Antigravity project template and Claude Code to launch your SaaS MVP with speed and precision.
content.answer_block: Stop waiting for the 'perfect' idea. Use the Antigravity project template to generate a validated SaaS boilerplate in minutes. By combining structural templates with Claude Code's autonomous execution, you bridge the gap between abstract concepts and a deployable MVP, ensuring your focus remains on revenue-generating features, not boilerplate architecture.
content.intro:
The graveyard of SaaS startups is filled with founders who spent months agonizing over the 'perfect' idea. You are staring at a blank screen, paralyzed by the fear of building something nobody wants. The reality is that the idea matters less than the execution velocity. If you can't ship, you can't validate, and if you can't validate, you don't have a business.

We are ending the cycle of indecision today. By leveraging the Antigravity project template, we bypass the architectural friction that kills most beginner projects. We will use Claude Code to transform your raw intent into a structured, production-ready codebase, allowing you to focus on the only thing that matters: solving a high-value problem for paying customers.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffold
steps.description: Establish the foundational directory structure using the Antigravity template to ensure your SaaS has built-in authentication, database ORM, and deployment configurations.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new SaaS project scaffold using the Antigravity template with support for Next.js, Supabase, and Stripe integration.

steps.title: Define the Business Value Proposition
steps.description: Articulate the specific user problem you are solving to ensure the AI generates high-conversion UI components rather than generic boilerplate.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a landing page component that focuses on solving [Insert Problem] for [Insert Persona], highlighting three key value propositions.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate landing page for target audience based on problem'

steps.title: Automate Database Schema Design
steps.description: Convert your business logic into a robust relational database schema to handle user data and subscription states.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a Supabase schema for a SaaS app that handles user profiles, project entities, and subscription tiers.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'apply schema migration for user and project tables'

steps.title: Implement Core CRUD Functionality
steps.description: Build the primary interaction layer where users solve their problem, ensuring the code follows the Antigravity architectural patterns.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Implement the CRUD logic for project entities, ensuring users can only view their own data and implement server-side validation.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'scaffold api routes for project management'

steps.title: Deploy and Validate with Real Users
steps.description: Push your MVP to a live environment to begin the feedback loop that validates your business model.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure the deployment environment for Vercel and check for any build-time errors in the current codebase.

pro_tips: Treat your codebase as a disposable asset; focus on the MVP version that validates the revenue model, not the cleanest code.
Use Claude Code's memory feature to keep your business context consistent across multiple sessions to avoid architectural drift.
Prioritize Stripe integration in your template settings immediately to ensure the 'buy' button is the first thing you test.
Keep your components granular; if a feature takes more than 3 prompts to build, break it into smaller functional units.
Always check the Antigravity logs after every generation to ensure the AI hasn't hallucinated non-existent dependency versions.
content.next_steps: Once your MVP is deployed, stop coding. Spend the next 48 hours conducting cold outreach to potential users to gather feedback and iterate based on actual usage, not your assumptions.
content.conversion_block: Stop waiting for the perfect moment to start your journey. The tools are ready, the framework is set, and the market is waiting for your solution. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
